tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I turn to you - Christina Aguilera
Capo: 1

[Intro] 
[ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
When I'm lost in the rain,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]
In your eyes I know I'll find the light[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
To light my way.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
And when I'm scared,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
And losing ground,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fm[/ch]
When my world is going crazy,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]
You can turn it all around.[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                       [ch]Fm/G#[/ch]
And when I'm down you're there[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
pushing me to the top.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
You're always there,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Gsus4[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
giving me all you've got.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
For a shield from the storm,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C/E[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
For a friend, for a love[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
to keep me safe and warm[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gsus4[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I turn to you.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]
For the strength to be strong,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C/E[/ch]          [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
For the will to carry on[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]
For everything you do,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Fm[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
for everything that's true[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
I turn to you.[/tab]

[Interlude]
[ch]Fm9[/ch]    [ch]Gsus4[/ch]  [ch]G7[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
When I lose the will to win,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]
I just reach for you and[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I can reach the sky again.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
I can do anything[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Fm[/ch]
'Cause your love is so amazing,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause your love inspires me.[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]         [ch]Fm/G#[/ch]
And when I need a friend,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
You're always on my side[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Giving me faith[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gsus4[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
taking me through the night[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
For a shield from the storm,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C/E[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
For a friend, for a love[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
to keep me safe and warm[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gsus4[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I turn to you.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]
For the strength to be strong,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C/E[/ch]          [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
For the will to carry on[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
For everything you do,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
I turn to you.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bbsus2[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
For the arms to be my shelter[/tab]
through all the rain,
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
For truth that will never change,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C/E[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
For someone to lean on,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbsus2[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]
For a heart I can rely on through anything,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gsus4[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
For that one who I can run to...[/tab]

(Key change)

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
For a shield from the storm,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
For a friend, for a love[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
to keep me safe and warm[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Asus4[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
I turn to you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]
For the strength to be strong,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]          [ch]Csus2[/ch]
For the will to carry on[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
For everything you do,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
for everything that's true[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
For everything you do,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
for everything that's true[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
I turn to you.[/tab]
